LAW AND MOTION 301, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT OR VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT WERE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm, Correct Or Vacate Contractual Arbitrration Award
Off Calendar Sep-24-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Philip T. Kilduff, Esq. Specially Appearing on behalf of the Plaintiff/Moving Party
(415) 673-0368
Toney Befford, In Propria Persona, Defendant/Opposing Party, (510) 313-0525

The Matter was argued. After the argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING LLC'S Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm, Correct Or Vacate Contractual Arbitrration Award IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. The Order and Judgment were signed in open court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 (301/PJB)
